title: lobelia ionantha
intro: Lobelia ionantha, also known as the African Blue Lobelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lobelia genus and is native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia ionantha include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and stress. Lobelia ionantha is typically prepared as a tincture, capsule, or infusion for its herbal applications.
